step_by_step_thinking: The auriculotemporal nerve, also known as the nervus intermedius of the mandibular division (V3) of the trigeminal nerve, runs around the superficial temporal artery before innervating structures such as muscles involved in mastication.
raw_response:
The auriculotemporal nerve, also known as the nervus intermedius of the mandibular division (V3) of the trigeminal nerve, runs around the superficial temporal artery before innervating structures such as muscles involved in mastication. 

Therefore, my answer is A: Superficial temporal artery.
